action.description: Read Third Time in Full – ADOPTED - 40-28-2AYES – Berch, Bingham, Burgoyne, Cannon, Cheatum, Church, Dygert, Egbert, Ehlers, Erickson, Fuhriman, Furniss, Galaviz, Gannon, Garner, Green, Hall(Stone), Handy, Haws, Healey, Hill, Manwaring, Mathias, McCann, Mickelsen, Miller, Monks, Nelsen, Palmer, Pickett, Pohanka, Raybould, Raymond, Rubel, Sauter, Shirts, Veile, Weber, Wheeler, Mr. SpeakerNAYS – Alfieri, Barbieri, Beiswenger, Boyle, Bruce, Cayler, Crane(12), Crane(13), Ehardt, Harris, Hawkins, Holtzclaw, Hostetler, Leavitt, Marmon, Mendive, Mitchell, Price, Rasor, Redman, Scott, Shepherd, Skaug, Tanner(13), Tanner(14), Thompson, Vander Woude, WisniewskiAbsent – Cornilles, PetzkeFloor Sponsor - FuhrimanTitle apvd - to Senate
